bullets: • Regularization is a technique used to prevent overfitting in machine learning models by adding a penalty term to the cost function that discourages large parameter values.
• The penalty term is typically proportional to the square of the parameter values, and its purpose is to keep the parameters small, which is equivalent to having a simple model with fewer features.
• In practice, regularization is often implemented by penalizing all parameters, including the bias term, but the bias term is usually not penalized in this course.

• The value of the regularization parameter, lambda, determines the relative importance of minimizing the mean squared error and keeping the parameters small, and choosing a good value for lambda is crucial for achieving a good balance between these two goals.

• Different values of lambda can lead to different behaviors in the learning algorithm, ranging from overfitting (lambda = 0) to underfitting (lambda = large values), and finding the right value of lambda is essential for achieving a good fit to the data.
raw:
• Regularization is a technique used to prevent overfitting in machine learning models by adding a penalty term to the cost function that discourages large parameter values.
• The penalty term is typically proportional to the square of the parameter values, and its purpose is to keep the parameters small, which is equivalent to having a simple model with fewer features.
• In practice, regularization is often implemented by penalizing all parameters, including the bias term, but the bias term is usually not penalized in this course.
• The value of the regularization parameter, lambda, determines the relative importance of minimizing the mean squared error and keeping the parameters small, and choosing a good value for lambda is crucial for achieving a good balance between these two goals.
• Different values of lambda can lead to different behaviors in the learning algorithm, ranging from overfitting (lambda = 0) to underfitting (lambda = large values), and finding the right value of lambda is essential for achieving a good fit to the data.
